scripts.build: node node_modules/sass/sass.js assets/sass/main.scss dist/main.css && node node_modules/esbuild/bin/esbuild assets/ts/main.ts --bundle --tsconfig=./tsconfig.json --outfile=dist/js/main.js && node node_modules/esbuild/bin/esbuild assets/ts/browser.ts --bundle --tsconfig=./tsconfig.json --outfile=dist/js/browser.js && node node_modules/esbuild/bin/esbuild assets/ts/breakpoints.ts --bundle --tsconfig=./tsconfig.json --outfile=dist/js/breakpoints.js && node node_modules/esbuild/bin/esbuild assets/ts/util.ts --bundle --tsconfig=./tsconfig.json --outfile=dist/js/util.js && node node_modules/esbuild/bin/esbuild assets/ts/authReact.tsx --bundle --tsconfig=./tsconfig.json --outfile=dist/js/auth-react.js
